title: habenaria massoniana
intro: Habenaria massoniana, also known as the Masson's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in countries such as India and China. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves being used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Habenaria massoniana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, with herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions being used to harness its medicinal properties.
